title: Decadent Egyptian Cheese Toast
description: A buttery, cheese-pull toast that evokes nostalgic Egyptian flavors with feta, mozzarella, and delicate gelatine leaf strips.

ingredients.name: saffron threads, soaked in hot water
gelatine leaf strips, soaked and drained

instructions: Preheat a large skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Brush the bread slices on both sides with melted butter and sprinkle with smoked paprika and a pinch of salt.
Place the bread in the skillet and cook until golden brown on one side, about 2 minutes.
Flip the bread, top each slice with crumbled feta, shredded mozzarella, and a sprinkle of chopped parsley.
Spoon a teaspoon of honey over the cheese and drizzle a few saffron-infused water drops for aroma.
Tear the soaked gelatine leaf strips into bite-sized pieces and scatter them over the cheese while the bread continues to cook.
Cover the skillet with a lid and cook for another 3 to 4 minutes until the cheese is melted and the gelatine leafs have softened.
Remove from heat, let the toast sit for a minute, then serve hot.
